violations.message: "Landing" — variant_labels is set on a non-upsell page (type=landing). The hint is meaningful only on upsell pages; remove it or move it to an upsell page.
"Upsell Empty Primary" — variant_labels.primary is required and must be a non-empty string (e.g. "Size").
"Upsell Bad Secondary" — variant_labels.secondary must be a non-empty string when set (omit the field for single-attribute products); got 42.
"Upsell Bad Shape" — variant_labels must be an object with a "primary" string field; got array.
